sourceMovie.title: 17 Again
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: 17 Again (2009) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Burr Steers's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 13 Going on 30
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 17 Again clicked for you, 13 Going on 30 (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after 17 Again?
faq.answer: Try 13 Going on 30, High School Musical, High School Musical 2—each shares DNA with 17 Again while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is 17 Again?
faq.answer: 17 Again (2009) is best described as Comedy, Fantasy, Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is 17 Again worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
